_comment: PROJECT FACTS for the example project. The portable rules reference these via {{name}}. To port the harness to another project, copy this file to project.<name>.json, fill in the same keys with that project's facts, and bind it to your session with /hansard:use <name> (or env HARNESS_PROJECT). The rules never change; only this file does.
preproc_example: torchaudio mel omitting power -> defaults to 2.0 -> OOD spectrogram -> 1.79x worse; the correct value is power=1.0
pad_ood_example: pure zeros encode to OOD code 351 (~40% of training targets); natural quiet is 43; use -50dB noise instead
forward_example: speech_mask over all positions; top_p bypassed by ban_silence; is_speech clearing self-feedback
config_override_example: DeepSpeed's WarmupDecayLR silently overrides sbatch's --lr_scheduler_type cosine
regime_example: LoRA's 2e-5 carried to a full-FT backbone overfits
poison_example: the text head poisoned by echo-loss, the timbre washed out by full-FT — both irreversible
demo_param: enc_power (2.0/1.0 must match the ckpt's training)
code_align_example: the sampler's 2nd arg is a ban-list, not a keep-list; don't pass is_causal=True to a manual KV-cache (Qwen2 hidden norm doubles)
codec_quirks: (1) codes are context-dependent (after prior speech=43, pure zeros=351); (2) verify encoder causality (bidirectional -> future leak -> streaming breaks); (3) LM control tokens (1024/128) != codec-decodable codes; (4) multi-codebook joint accuracy decays exponentially, single-codebook top-1 must be >=70%
eval_region_example: audio-reads-text looked like 62%, but the real speech region was only 12% (the 62% was the trivial 351-repeat silence score)
eval_crutch_example: onset_floor forcing onset, force-feeding the text row, blanking history
eval_deploy_example: bidirectional encoder over the full window inflates timing; offline continuous audio with text turns dropped != real duplex
